steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The researchers determined “a complex set of factors” that enable planetary development in binary systems.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Straightforward means simple and uncomplicated. The other choices don't work: inconclusive contradicts the passage, discernible doesn't capture the simplicity-complexity contrast, and unbiased is irrelevant.

Since researchers discovered the explanation was actually complex, what was previously missing was a straightforward answer.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
